# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that accepts build parameters from users and executes them as shell commands. Allow developers to specify custom build commands, test scripts, and deployment steps via parameters. This provides maximum flexibility for different project types.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    parameters {
        choice(
            name: 'PROJECT_TYPE',
            choices: ['maven', 'gradle', 'node', 'python', 'custom'],
            description: 'Select the project type for default command suggestions'
        )
        string(
            name: 'WORKSPACE_DIR',
            defaultValue: '.',
            description: 'Working directory relative to the repository root'
        )
        text(
            name: 'SETUP_COMMANDS',
            defaultValue: '''echo "Setting up environment..."
# Add setup commands here, e.g.:
# apt-get update && apt-get install -y some-package
# pip install virtualenv''',
            description: 'Shell commands to set up the build environment (one per line)'
        )
        text(
            name: 'BUILD_COMMANDS',
            defaultValue: '''echo "Running build..."
# Examples:
# Maven: mvn clean package -DskipTests
# Gradle: ./gradlew build -x test
# Node: npm ci && npm run build
# Python: pip install -r requirements.txt && python setup.py build''',
            description: 'Shell commands to build the project (one per line)'
        )
        text(
            name: 'TEST_COMMANDS',
            defaultValue: '''echo "Running tests..."
# Examples:
# Maven: mvn test
# Gradle: ./gradlew test
# Node: npm test
# Python: pytest --junitxml=reports/test-results.xml''',
            description: 'Shell commands to run tests (one per line)'
        )
        text(
            name: 'CODE_ANALYSIS_COMMANDS',
            defaultValue: '''echo "Running code analysis..."
# Examples:
# SonarQube: mvn sonar:sonar
# ESLint: npx eslint src/
# Pylint: pylint src/''',
            description: 'Shell commands for static code analysis (one per line)'
        )
        text(
            name: 'PACKAGE_COMMANDS',
            defaultValue: '''echo "Packaging artifacts..."
# Examples:
# Docker: docker build -t myapp:${BUILD_NUMBER} .
# Tar: tar -czf app-${BUILD_NUMBER}.tar.gz dist/
# Zip: zip -r app-${BUILD_NUMBER}.zip build/''',
            description: 'Shell commands to package the application (one per line)'
        )
        text(
            name: 'DEPLOY_COMMANDS',
            defaultValue: '''echo "Deploying application..."
# Examples:
# Kubernetes: kubectl apply -f k8s/
# AWS: aws s3 sync dist/ s3://my-bucket/
# SSH: scp app.tar.gz user@server:/opt/app/''',
            description: 'Shell commands to deploy the application (one per line)'
        )
        text(
            name: 'POST_DEPLOY_COMMANDS',
            defaultValue: '''echo "Running post-deployment verification..."
# Examples:
# Health check: curl -f http://myapp.example.com/health
# Smoke test: ./scripts/smoke-test.sh''',
            description: 'Shell commands to run after deployment (one per line)'
        )
        text(
            name: 'CLEANUP_COMMANDS',
            defaultValue: '''echo "Cleaning up..."
# Examples:
# Docker: docker image prune -f
# Temp files: rm -rf tmp/''',
            description: 'Shell commands to clean up after the pipeline (one per line)'
        )
        text(
            name: 'ENVIRONMENT_VARS',
            defaultValue: '''# KEY=VALUE format, one per line
# APP_ENV=production
# DEBUG=false
# JAVA_OPTS=-Xmx512m''',
            description: 'Custom environment variables (KEY=VALUE format, one per line)'
        )
        string(
            name: 'GIT_REPO_URL',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Git repository URL (leave empty to use pipeline SCM)'
        )
        string(
            name: 'GIT_BRANCH',
            defaultValue: 'main',
            description: 'Git branch to checkout'
        )
        string(
            name: 'GIT_CREDENTIALS_ID',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Jenkins credentials ID for Git authentication'
        )
        string(
            name: 'ARTIFACT_PATHS',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Comma-separated paths of artifacts to archive (e.g., target/*.jar,dist/*.zip)'
        )
        string(
            name: 'TEST_REPORT_PATHS',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Comma-separated paths for JUnit test reports (e.g., target/surefire-reports/*.xml)'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'SKIP_TESTS',
            defaultValue: false,
            description: 'Skip the test stage'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'SKIP_CODE_ANALYSIS',
            defaultValue: false,
            description: 'Skip the code analysis stage'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'SKIP_DEPLOY',
            defaultValue: false,
            description: 'Skip the deployment stage'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'DRY_RUN',
            defaultValue: false,
            description: 'Print commands without executing them'
        )
        string(
            name: 'SHELL_EXECUTABLE',
            defaultValue: '/bin/bash',
            description: 'Shell executable to use (e.g., /bin/bash, /bin/sh, /bin/zsh)'
        )
        string(
            name: 'TIMEOUT_MINUTES',
            defaultValue: '60',
            description: 'Pipeline timeout in minutes'
        )
        string(
            name: 'NOTIFICATION_EMAIL',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Email address for build notifications (leave empty to skip)'
        )
    }

    options {
        timeout(time: "${params.TIMEOUT_MINUTES}".toInteger(), unit: 'MINUTES')
        timestamps()
        ansiColor('xterm')
        buildDiscarder(logRotator(numToKeepStr: '20'))
    }

    environment {
        BUILD_TIMESTAMP = sh(script: 'date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S', returnStdout: true).trim()
        PIPELINE_PROJECT_TYPE = "${params.PROJECT_TYPE}"
    }

    stages {
        stage('Initialize') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "============================================="
                    echo "Pipeline Configuration Summary"
                    echo "============================================="
                    echo "Project Type:     ${params.PROJECT_TYPE}"
                    echo "Working Dir:      ${params.WORKSPACE_DIR}"
                    echo "Git Repo:         ${params.GIT_REPO_URL ?: 'Using pipeline SCM'}"
                    echo "Git Branch:       ${params.GIT_BRANCH}"
                    echo "Skip Tests:       ${params.SKIP_TESTS}"
                    echo "Skip Analysis:    ${params.SKIP_CODE_ANALYSIS}"
                    echo "Skip Deploy:      ${params.SKIP_DEPLOY}"
                    echo "Dry Run:          ${params.DRY_RUN}"
                    echo "Shell:            ${params.SHELL_EXECUTABLE}"
                    echo "Timeout:          ${params.TIMEOUT_MINUTES} minutes"
                    echo "Build Number:     ${env.BUILD_NUMBER}"
                    echo "Build Timestamp:  ${env.BUILD_TIMESTAMP}"
                    echo "============================================="

                    // Parse and set custom environment variables
                    def envVars = params.ENVIRONMENT_VARS
                    if (envVars) {
                        def parsedVars = []
                        envVars.split('\n').each { line ->
                            line = line.trim()
                            if (line && !line.startsWith('#') && line.contains('=')) {
                                parsedVars.add(line)
                            }
                        }
                        if (parsedVars) {
                            echo "Custom environment variables:"
                            parsedVars.each { v ->
                                def key = v.split('=')[0]
                                echo "  ${key}=****"
                            }
                            env.CUSTOM_ENV_VARS = parsedVars.join('\n')
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Checkout') {
            when {
                expression { return params.GIT_REPO_URL?.trim() }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Checking out from ${params.GIT_REPO_URL} branch ${params.GIT_BRANCH}"
                    if (params.GIT_CREDENTIALS_ID?.trim()) {
                        git(
                            url: params.GIT_REPO_URL,
                            branch: params.GIT_BRANCH,
                            credentialsId: params.GIT_CREDENTIALS_ID
                        )
                    } else {
                        git(
                            url: params.GIT_REPO_URL,
                            branch: params.GIT_BRANCH
                        )
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Setup Environment') {
            steps {
                script {
                    executeUserCommands('Setup Environment', params.SETUP_COMMANDS)
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Build') {
            steps {
                script {
                    executeUserCommands('Build', params.BUILD_COMMANDS)
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Test') {
            when {
                expression { return !params.SKIP_TESTS }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    executeUserCommands('Test', params.TEST_COMMANDS)
                }
            }
            post {
                always {
                    script {
                        if (params.TEST_REPORT_PATHS?.trim()) {
                            try {
                                junit(
                                    testResults: params.TEST_REPORT_PATHS,
                                    allowEmptyResults: true
                                )
                                echo "Test reports published from: ${params.TEST_REPORT_PATHS}"
                            } catch (Exception e) {
                                echo "Warning: Could not publish test reports: ${e.message}"
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Code Analysis') {
            when {
                expression { return !params.SKIP_CODE_ANALYSIS }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    executeUserCommands('Code Analysis', params.CODE_ANALYSIS_COMMANDS)
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Package') {
            steps {
                script {
                    executeUserCommands('Package', params.PACKAGE_COMMANDS)
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Archive Artifacts') {
            when {
                expression { return params.ARTIFACT_PATHS?.trim() }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    try {
                        archiveArtifacts(
                            artifacts: params.ARTIFACT_PATHS,
                            allowEmptyArchive: true,
                            fingerprint: true
                        )
                        echo "Artifacts archived from: ${params.ARTIFACT_PATHS}"
                    } catch (Exception e) {
                        echo "Warning: Could not archive artifacts: ${e.message}"
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy') {
            when {
                expression { return !params.SKIP_DEPLOY }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    if (!params.DRY_RUN) {
                        input(
                            message: 'Proceed with deployment?',
                            ok: 'Deploy',
                            submitter: ''
                        )
                    }
                    executeUserCommands('Deploy', params.DEPLOY_COMMANDS)
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Post-Deploy Verification') {
            when {
                expression { return !params.SKIP_DEPLOY }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    executeUserCommands('Post-Deploy Verification', params.POST_DEPLOY_COMMANDS)
                }
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        always {
            script {
                echo "============================================="
                echo "Running cleanup commands..."
                echo "============================================="
                executeUserCommands('Cleanup', params.CLEANUP_COMMANDS)

                echo "============================================="
                echo "Pipeline Result: ${currentBuild.currentResult}"
                echo "Duration: ${currentBuild.durationString}"
                echo "============================================="
            }
        }
        success {
            script {
                if (params.NOTIFICATION_EMAIL?.trim()) {
                    try {
                        emailext(
                            to: params.NOTIFICATION_EMAIL,
                            subject: "SUCCESS: Pipeline ${env.JOB_NAME} #${env.BUILD_NUMBER}",
                            body: """
                                <h2>Pipeline Succeeded</h2>
                                <p><b>Job:</b> ${env.JOB_NAME}</p>
                                <p><b>Build Number:</b> ${env.BUILD_NUMBER}</p>
                                <p><b>Project Type:</b> ${params.PROJECT_TYPE}</p>
                                <p><b>Duration:</b> ${currentBuild.durationString}</p>
                                <p><b>URL:</b> <a href="${env.BUILD_URL}">${env.BUILD_URL}</a></p>
                            """,
                            mimeType: 'text/html'
                        )
                    } catch (Exception e) {
                        echo "Warning: Could not send email notification: ${e.message}"
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        failure {
            script {
                if (params.NOTIFICATION_EMAIL?.trim()) {
                    try {
                        emailext(
                            to: params.NOTIFICATION_EMAIL,
                            subject: "FAILURE: Pipeline ${env.JOB_NAME} #${env.BUILD_NUMBER}",
                            body: """
                                <h2>Pipeline Failed</h2>
                                <p><b>Job:</b> ${env.JOB_NAME}</p>
                                <p><b>Build Number:</b> ${env.BUILD_NUMBER}</p>
                                <p><b>Project Type:</b> ${params.PROJECT_TYPE}</p>
                                <p><b>Duration:</b> ${currentBuild.durationString}</p>
                                <p><b>URL:</b> <a href="${env.BUILD_URL}">${env.BUILD_URL}</a></p>
                                <p>Please check the console output for details.</p>
                            """,
                            mimeType: 'text/html'
                        )
                    } catch (Exception e) {
                        echo "Warning: Could not send email notification: ${e.message}"
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

def executeUserCommands(String stageName, String commands) {
    if (!commands?.trim()) {
        echo "No commands specified for stage: ${stageName}"
        return
    }

    // Filter out empty lines and comment-only lines to check if there are real commands
    def filteredCommands = commands.split('\n').findAll { line ->
        def trimmed = line.trim()
        trimmed && !trimmed.startsWith('#')
    }

    if (!filteredCommands) {
        echo "No executable commands found for stage: ${stageName} (only comments/empty lines)"
        return
    }

    echo "============================================="
    echo "Executing stage: ${stageName}"
    echo "============================================="

    // Build the environment variable export block
    def envExports = ''
    if (env.CUSTOM_ENV_VARS) {
        env.CUSTOM_ENV_VARS.split('\n').each { envVar ->
            if (envVar?.trim()) {
                envExports += "export ${envVar.trim()}\n"
            }
        }
    }

    // Add common variables
    envExports += "export PIPELINE_STAGE=\"${stageName}\"\n"
    envExports += "export PIPELINE_PROJECT_TYPE=\"${params.PROJECT_TYPE}\"\n"
    envExports += "export PIPELINE_BUILD_NUMBER=\"${env.BUILD_NUMBER}\"\n"
    envExports += "export PIPELINE_BUILD_TIMESTAMP=\"${env.BUILD_TIMESTAMP}\"\n"

    def workDir = params.WORKSPACE_
